model_specification_line: model = smf.ols('full_time ~ treatment + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=analysis_df).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': analysis_df['statefip']})
sample_selection: Hispanic origin detailed codes 100-107, birthplace code 200 (Mexico), and noncitizen indicator (citizen == 3)
Year-of-immigration between 1980 and 2012, birth year between 1978 and 1997, and immigration year no earlier than birth year
